prd.problem: The OMP beads template has skills for individual tools (br, bv) and a comprehensive OMP reference skill, but lacks a single entry-point skill that explains how br and bv together form the template backbone.
prd.outcome: A new skill .omp/skills/backbone/SKILL.md that is the first skill agents should load, explains the br + bv backbone concept, maps every workflow phase to exact tool commands, and defines the complete artifact layout and conventions.
acceptanceCriteria: Explains the backbone concept: br owns state, bv informs decisions, OMP executes
Includes a phase routing table mapping each phase to tools and artifacts
Defines artifact directory layout with expected files per phase
References other skills without duplicating content
Includes minimum pre-flight checks per phase
Does not conflict with existing skills, commands, or agents
constraints: Do not duplicate content from br, bv, or omp skills

risks.mitigation: Backbone is reference card; orchestrator is active routing agent
Keep concise, reference other skills, update with conventions
